description: This image displays the logo for the Land Monitoring Service. The logo features a stylized graphic in dark olive green on the left, composed of an incomplete circular or arched element enclosing two vertical bar chart-like structures and a wheat stalk. To the right of this graphic, the text "Land Monitoring Service" is presented in two lines, also in a dark olive green colour. The word "Land" is on the first line, and "Monitoring Service" is on the second line. The background is white.
